name: pipeline-observability
title: Pipeline Observability
subtitle: runs, runtime, throughput & stage health
description: A data-pipeline observability showcase — a success gauge, a runtime trend, a stage-throughput waterfall, a conversion funnel, and runs by pipeline.

dataAccesses.name: PipeKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status='SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS success_pct, ROUND(AVG(runtime_sec)/60.0,1) AS avg_min, SUM(CASE WHEN status='FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failures FROM fact_pipeline_run

dataAccesses.name: SuccessRate
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status='SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS success_pct FROM fact_pipeline_run

dataAccesses.name: RuntimeTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, ROUND(AVG(r.runtime_sec)/60.0,1) AS avg_min, ROUND(MAX(r.runtime_sec)/60.0,1) AS peak_min FROM fact_pipeline_run r JOIN dim_date d ON r.run_date_key=d.date_key GROUP BY d.year_month_number, d.year_month_name ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: StageThroughput
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT stage, SUM(rows_in - rows_out) AS dropped FROM v_pipeline_stage GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(stage_order)

dataAccesses.name: StageFunnel
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT stage, SUM(rows_out) AS rows FROM v_pipeline_stage GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(stage_order)

dataAccesses.name: RunsByPipeline
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT pipeline_name AS pipeline, COUNT(*) AS runs FROM fact_pipeline_run GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 8

kpis.label: Total Runs
kpis.info: Pipeline executions in the observed window.

kpis.label: Success Rate
kpis.info: Share of runs that completed successfully.

kpis.label: Failures
kpis.info: Runs that ended in a failed state.

panels.title: Success Rate
panels.info: Overall run success across all pipelines.

panels.title: Stage Conversion
panels.info: Row throughput surviving each pipeline stage.

panels.title: Rows Dropped by Stage
panels.info: Where rows are filtered or lost across stages.

panels.title: Runtime Trend
panels.info: Average and peak runtime over time — watch the gap widen.
